form.formComment: Resuming after a break; having raced just once last campaign finished ninth of 14 starters at Newbury on November 6 over 3270m, 32 len behind Jackie Hobbs carrying 70kg at $81. First up last campaign finished ninth of 15 starters at Worcester on August 20 over 3200m, 32 len behind Celestron Star carrying 71.5kg at $3.50. Capable and looks a top-three chance.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 33 day letup. Last outing finished sixth of 8 starters at Hereford on March 7 over 3200m, 17 len behind Granny Hawkins with 74kg at $12. Race before came from midfield; finished 12th of 13 runners at Southwell All Weather on February 20 over 2400m, 38 len behind Constitution Hill with 57.5kg at $201. Might find this a bit too tough.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Not raced for 43 days. First-up after two months won by 1.3 len Wincanton on February 25 over 3000m defeating Harthill carrying 70.5kg at $6.50 in a hurdle. Previously second-up finished fifth of 14 runners at Uttoxeter on October 5 over 3200m, 6 len behind Platenium with 69.5kg at $29. Big chance to repeat the dose.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. form.formComment: Comes off a 56 day let-up. Last start finished seventh of 10 starters at this track on February 12 over 3800m, in the wet; 19 len behind Cooler Than Me with 66kg at $6.50. The run before held ground to the line finished third of 10 starters at this track on February 3 over 3800m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind Our Dylan with 63.5kg at $9. Must be a chance.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Not raced for 42 days.
